data.name: About_Line1
data.value: We provide a seamless and highly intuitive navigation experience.

data.name: About_Line2
data.value: Whether you are searching for your next nail art inspiration

data.name: About_Line3
data.value: or looking for a certified professional,

data.name: About_Line4
data.value: our platform leverages advanced data analytics to integrate the hottest trends from Pinterest, and Instagram with premier salons across Taiwan.

data.name: About_Line5
data.value: We aim to create an intelligent nail navigation hub

data.name: About_Line6
data.value: where achieving your beauty aesthetic is smooth and simple.

data.name: ContactUsContent
data.value: If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please feel free to contact us via the "Contact Us" link at the bottom of the page.

data.name: DataCollectionContent
data.value: When you search on NailArtHub or contact us, we may collect your contact information (such as your email address). We use this data solely for responding to inquiries, optimizing your website experience, and necessary site management.

data.name: DataProtectionContent
data.value: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, modification, or disclosure. We will never sell, rent, or exchange your personal data with any third party.

data.name: Hero_Sub_Line1
data.value: Looking for the latest trending colors? The most popular styles? Or trying to find a nail salon near you?

data.name: Hero_Sub_Line2
data.value: Our platform offers the most intuitive search experience.

data.name: Hero_Sub_Line3
data.value: Whether you're gathering inspiration or seeking professional services,

data.name: Hero_Sub_Line4
data.value: your beauty desires can be effortlessly fulfilled right here!

data.name: IGpost
data.value: Paste featured public Instagram post URL for preview card.

data.name: MaxTagsExceededError
data.value: For basic listings, you can select up to {0} style tags only.

data.name: Milestone_Goal
data.value: Current Goal: Welcoming our first 100 premium nail salons to collaborate on optimizing platform stability and service excellence.

data.name: No_studios_found
data.value: No studios found matching the current filters.

data.name: No_trending_styles
data.value: No trending styles found matching your criteria.

data.name: PaymentLink
data.value: Go to pay/ Get Trade NO.

data.name: Plan_Monthly_Desc
data.value: The support of a cup of coffee. Become one of our founding visionaries. You will receive exclusive access to beta test our "Advanced Booking Automation" features and lifetime loyalty benefits.

data.name: Plan_OneTime_Desc
data.value: Perfect for salon owners wishing to experience the first wave, or patrons who share our vision. This contribution will fully fund early-stage deployment and essential platform maintenance.

data.name: PrivacyIntro
data.value: NailArtHub takes your privacy seriously. To ensure you can use our services with peace of mind, we have established this Privacy Policy to explain how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

data.name: Process_Subtitle
data.value: Master the Fingertip Trends in 3 Simple Steps

data.name: SearchingLabel
data.value: Searching for the latest trends of

data.name: Step1_Desc
data.value: Automatically tracks the latest nail art videos and images across YouTube, Pinterest, and Instagram, precisely analyzing views and trending keyword tags.

data.name: Step2_Desc
data.value: Effortlessly filter styles that match your current mood with a single click, based on trending tags like Cateye, French, or Japanese style.

data.name: Step3_Desc
data.value: Directly connects you to local nail artists' portfolios on Instagram, bringing the best local salons right to your screen.

data.name: Story_P1
data.value: Welcome to NailArtHub! I am the independent developer of this aesthetic resource integration tool. As someone who deeply loves aesthetics and pure, clean design, I often find myself thinking: wouldn't it be wonderful if Taiwan could have a dedicated visual art space for nails and salons—one free of cluttered ads and full of premium elegance?

data.name: Story_P2
data.value: Driven by this vision, I began crafting the next generation of code—from database design to an intuitive, personalized user experience. NailArtHub is more than just a platform; it is a gift dedicated to connecting the fashion and aesthetic communities. Your support will go directly towards stable server operations and funding the research and development of our next phase: "Salon Management Tools".

data.name: SubmittedSLabel2
data.value: We will review your application as soon as possible.

data.name: SupportPlanDesc
data.value: Welcome to NailArtHub! We’re building this space together. To support our ongoing development and keep the platform ad-free, we invite you to contribute a one-time setup & listing fee of NT$300.

data.name: TermAgreementText
data.value: I agree to submit the business information above for NAH platform review. I certify that all provided operational content and nail art imagery are accurate and non-infringing. The applicant shall bear full legal responsibility for any third-party intellectual property disputes; NAH assumes no liability arising from the submitted or aggregated content.

data.name: ThirdPartyPaymentContent
data.value: If you engage in any financial transactions on our site, your payment details will be processed through trusted third-party payment platforms such as ECPay. We do not directly store your full credit card numbers or bank account information.

data.name: WaitingLabel
data.value: This will take about 15 seconds, please wait a moment.
